svg.aria-label: Five-tier PriorityClass scheme and eviction order
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="priority-tiers"><mxGraphModel dx="900" dy="520" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="470" math="0" shadow="0" background="#0b1020"> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/> <mxCell id="title" value="PriorityClasses — who stays when the cluster runs tight" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=22;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#eef2ff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="30" y="20" width="760" height="32" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="sub" value="Higher value wins. Under pressure, the lowest tier yields first." style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=13;fontColor=#9aa6c8;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="30" y="56" width="760" height="20" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="b1" value="feather-critical
Storage — Ceph OSD · MON · MGR · data availability
1 000 000 000" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#27A9E1;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#04263a;align=left;spacingLeft=16;fontSize=13;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="150" y="96" width="610" height="56" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="b2" value="feather-platform
Databases · Ingress (Envoy) · CA (step-ca)
900 000 000" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2A388F;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#eef2ff;align=left;spacingLeft=16;fontSize=13;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="150" y="160" width="610" height="56" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="b3" value="feather-high
Observability · Registry (Harbor) · Redis · poolers
100 000" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#91268F;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#fbe9fb;align=left;spacingLeft=16;fontSize=13;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="150" y="224" width="610" height="56" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="b4" value="feather-standard
Standard apps — Outline · Leantime · Reposilite · …
1 000" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F7931D;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#3a2305;align=left;spacingLeft=16;fontSize=13;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="150" y="288" width="610" height="56" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="b5" value="feather-low
Best-effort — BlueMap · Node-RED · Uptime-Kuma
-10" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#5b678f;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#f1f4ff;align=left;spacingLeft=16;fontSize=13;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="150" y="352" width="610" height="56" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="aUp" value="protected" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#34d399;strokeWidth=3;fontColor=#34d399;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=bottom;" edge="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="800" y="150" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="800" y="100" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry></mxCell> <mxCell id="aDn" value="evicted first" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#ef4444;strokeWidth=3;fontColor=#ef4444;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" edge="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="800" y="354" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="800" y="404" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry></mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel></diagram></mxfile>
svg.text: PriorityClasses — who stays when the cluster runs tight
Higher value wins. Under pressure, the lowest tier yields first.

g.text: Storage — Ceph OSD · MON · MGR · data availability
